title: ICCAT Southern Atlantic Albacore Management Strategy Evaluation
text: This site hosts the materials for the Management Strategy Evaluation (MSE) process for Southern Atlantic albacore tuna.

title: ICCAT Southern Atlantic Albacore Management Strategy Evaluation
text:
Materials

Trial Specifications Document: the operating models, management procedures, and performance metrics used in the MSE.
iccatSALB R package: the R package implementing the MSE analysis, with full technical/code documentation.
